title: Non-ADV Promotions and Club Avolta Enhancements
goal: Enhance OMS with Club Avolta ID and tier visibility, improved non-ADV promotion management, and locker delivery tracking.
description: Multiple OMS enhancements including: Avolta ID and tier displayed on the order detail page and the pick-up sheet. Non-ADV promotions fields now have UI validations. Items can be excluded from Non-ADV promotions using SAP codes. Cart calculation logic updated to exclude configured products from Non-ADV promotions. Two new locker delivery statuses added: Locker Booked and Locker Retrieved. Additional operational improvements include quota violations section always in expanded view, stock source and stock destination columns added on orders page, Club Avolta ID and Tier details on order details page, import and display of codes from Magento, and collection time added to the Collection date column.
